hooks.command: python3 -c 'import json,sys; d=json.loads(sys.stdin.read()); cwd=d.get("cwd") or ""; cmd=(d.get("tool_input") or {}).get("command") or ""; m="/.claude/worktrees/"; i=cwd.find(m); root=cwd[:i] if i!=-1 else None; cleaned=cmd.replace(root+m,"") if root else ""; tokens=cmd.replace("&&"," ").replace(";"," ").replace("|"," ").split(); bad = root is not None and bool(cmd) and root in cleaned and "git" in tokens; reason="This command references the main checkout (" + str(root) + ") instead of your current worktree (" + cwd + "). Your worktree is a full, independent checkout with everything you need. Never cd or use git -C back into the main checkout from an isolated worktree, since that stages or commits against the wrong tree. Run the git command directly against your current directory instead."; print(json.dumps({"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":reason}})) if bad else None'

COMMAND=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty' 2>/dev/null); [ -z "$COMMAND" ] && exit 0; echo "$COMMAND" | grep -qE "git (clean|reset|checkout --|stash drop)" || exit 0; GITDIR=$(git rev-parse --git-dir 2>/dev/null); case "$GITDIR" in *worktrees*) GITCOMMONDIR=$(git rev-parse --path-format=absolute --git-common-dir 2>/dev/null); MAIN_DIR="${GITCOMMONDIR%/.git}"; MSG="Heads up: you are in a git worktree, and this command is a destructive git operation (clean/reset/checkout --/stash drop). Worktrees share one .git object store with the main tree at $MAIN_DIR, so this can affect the main tree too. Proceed only if you intend that."; jq -n --arg msg "$MSG" '{systemMessage: $msg, hookSpecificOutput: {hookEventName: "PreToolUse", additionalContext: $msg}}' ;; esac; exit 0
hooks.statusMessage: Checking for destructive cross-tree git commands...

hooks.command: branch=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); if [ "$branch" = "main" ]; then echo "ERROR: Cannot edit files on main. Create a branch first."; exit 2; fi

file=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); echo "$file" | grep -qE "[/\\]app[/\\].*\.(dart)$|[/\\]app[/\\]pubspec\.(yaml|lock)$" && { ( cd app && flutter test 2>&1 ); [ $? -ne 0 ] && exit 2; }; exit 0
